description_long: This object is a stylized flower with five elongated, slightly curved petals radiating outward from a central point. The petals are a gradient of cool blue tones with hints of purple near the tips and base, giving a delicate and ethereal appearance. Each petal has visible vein-like textures, adding to the naturalistic detail. The flower lacks a visible stem or leaves, focusing attention on the symmetrical arrangement of the petals. The overall form is flat and open, resembling a simple, abstracted blossom. The coloration and shape suggest it could be a decorative or ornamental flower often found in urban parks or landscaped areas.
description: A stylized blue and purple flower with five elongated, veined petals radiating from a central point. The design is delicate, flat, and symmetrical.
description_view_0: Five petals are visible, with the lower petal appearing slightly broader and the upper petals fanning outward.
description_view_1: The central petal is most prominent, with the side petals curving gently backward and the lower petals less visible.
description_view_2: The central petal is again dominant, but the rightmost petal appears more forward, creating a slight asymmetry.
description_view_3: The petals are evenly spaced, with the left and right petals extending outward and the lower petal curving forward.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, radiating symmetrically from a central point with no visible overlap or layering. The arrangement is simple and evenly spaced, typical of actinomorphic (radially symmetrical) flowers.
